RioFantasiaRule.Rule1: Rio Fantasia is a 3-reel, 3-row video slot featuring Stacked Wild symbols, multiplier and respin until win.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 5 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{20} and %{400} will be formatted accordingly, do not translate.
Rule2.example: The game is played with 5 bet lines (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 10.

Rule3.comment: %{currency} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate.

RioFantasiaShared.StackedWildSymbolDesc1: During any spin, 3 Wild symbols in a reel will be transformed into the Stacked Wild symbol.
RioFantasiaShared.StackedWildSymbolDesc2: During any main game spin, when 1 or more Stacked Wild symbols appear in any reel, all wins in that spin will be multiplied by x2 before wins are paid.
RioFantasiaShared.RespinUntilWinFeatureDesc1: During any spin, the Respin Until Win Feature may be randomly triggered while the reels are spinning.
RioFantasiaShared.RespinUntilWinFeatureDesc2: During the Respin Until Win Feature, the Stacked Wild symbol will appear fully on reel 2, and the other reels will respin until there is a win.
RioFantasiaShared.RespinUntilWinFeatureDesc3: The win from the Respin Until Win Feature will be multiplied by a multiplier ranging from x5 to x20 before wins are paid.
RioFantasiaShared.MaximumWinDesc1: The maximum win amount is %{2000}x of the bet amount.
RioFantasiaShared.MaximumWinDesc2: If the total win in the main game or the Respin Until Win Feature reaches %{2000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
